response:
Yo, listen up, I got a new device in my hand
Latest smartphone, it's takin' over the land
[Brand Name] and [Model Name], it's the one I adore
With [Operating System] and [Processor], it's askin' for more

It's got a [Screen Size] inch screen, so crisp and so bright
[Resolution] resolution, it's a visual delight

And with [Battery Life] battery life, it lasts all the time

I'm rockin' [Storage Capacity] GB, of storage so neat
And with [RAM] GB RAM, it's multitaskin' on the beat
It's [Waterproof] and [Dustproof], so I don't have to fear

P.P.S. I'm lovin' this new phone, it's the best I've ever had
Gonna take some selfies, and make some memories that won't be bad
It's the future in my hands, and I'm feelin' so fly
This new smartphone, it's takin' me to the sky!
